case_title: ELENA A. JACKSON VS. DIANA LIAO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA A.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIAO, DIANA CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,366.00 FILED BY JACKSON, ELENA A. AS TO DEFENDANT LIAO, DIANA CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-27-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ELENA A. JACKSON IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY KENNETH WRIGHT, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT DIANA LIAO IS PRESENT. MS. LIAO WAIVES SERVICE AS AN INDIVIDUAL. DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER IS PRESENT. REPRESENTE BY DIANA LIAO, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.
